classes.label: ProfileCache
description:
A stable, session-scoped cache for user profiles.

Replaces the previous `useState<Map>`-based `UserProfileStore` with a plain
class that avoids React state identity changes on every cache update. Uses
`useSyncExternalStore` for reactivity: only subscribers re-render when
profiles are loaded.

Key properties:
- **Stable reference**: created once via `useRef`, never changes identity.
- **`requested` set**: tracks in-flight requests so concurrent callers don't
  issue duplicate `bulkResolve` calls. UIDs omitted from a response are
  cleared so future calls can retry.
- **Built-in batcher**: `loadOne` batches individual requests within a 50ms
  window via `createBatcher`.
- **No React dependencies**: can be extracted to core later.

children.label: resolve
description: Synchronous lookup by UID. Returns `undefined` if not cached.

children.label: getAll
description: Get all cached profiles.

children.label: ensureLoaded
description:
Bulk load with in-flight dedup via `requested` set.

UIDs already in the cache or previously requested are skipped. This makes
concurrent calls from priming, facets, and cells safe without external
dedup logic.

children.label: loadOne
description:
Single UID load — batched via `createBatcher` (50ms window).

Multiple cells mounting in the same frame get their `loadOne` calls
batched into one `bulkResolve`.

children.label: seed
description:
Inject already-resolved profiles into the cache without a network call.

Use when profiles have been fetched through an external path (e.g. a
custom `FilterFacetConfig.getFacets`) and should be available for
synchronous lookups via `resolve`/`getAll`. Does not overwrite existing
entries.

children.label: subscribe
description: Subscribe to cache changes. Returns an unsubscribe function.

children.label: getSnapshot
description: Returns the current version (increments on every merge).

functions.label: ContentList
description: Layout shell for a Content List.

functions.label: ContentListEmptyState
description:
Provider-aware empty state component for Content List.

`<ContentList>` uses this component as its default empty rendering. Pass it
as `emptyState` when you need custom copy or actions.
signature: ({ iconType, title, body, primaryAction, secondaryAction, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:

children.label:
{
  iconType = 'documents',
  title,
  body,
  primaryAction,
  secondaryAction,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'content-list-empty-state',
}

functions.label: ContentListFooter
description:
Footer component for content lists.

Renders pagination controls that match the layout of `EuiBasicTable`'s
`PaginationBar` ("Rows per page" on the left, page buttons on the right).

When pagination is not enabled in the provider, renders nothing.

functions.label: ContentListProvider
description:
Main provider component for content list functionality, including data fetching
(via React Query), sorting, search, and tags filtering.

Props like `dataSource`, `features`, and `services` should be stable references to avoid
unnecessary re-renders. Configuration from `features.sorting`, `features.pagination`, and
`features.search` is read once at mount; use a `key` prop to remount if you need to change
initial state dynamically.

Service-dependent features wrap children with the appropriate context provider:

- **Tags** (`services.tags`): wraps with `ContentManagementTagsProvider`, enabling tag
  display and filtering. The service's `parseSearchQuery` (if present) is passed through
  to support extracting tag filters from the search bar query text.
- **Favorites** (`services.favorites`): wraps with `FavoritesContextProvider`, enabling
  star buttons and starred filtering.
- **User profiles** (`services.userProfiles`): wraps with `ProfileCacheContext.Provider`,
  providing a shared
for synchronous profile resolution.
signature: ({ children, dataSource, labels, item, isReadOnly, id, queryKeyScope: queryKeyScopeProp, features, services, profileCache, }:

children.label:
{
  children,
  dataSource,
  labels,
  item,
  isReadOnly,
  id,
  queryKeyScope: queryKeyScopeProp,
  features = {},
  services,
  profileCache,
}

functions.label: ContentListTable
signature: (({ title, tableLayout, compressed, scrollableInline, responsiveBreakpoint, emptyState: customEmptyState, children, filter, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:

children.label:
{
  title,
  tableLayout = 'auto',
  compressed = false,
  scrollableInline = true,
  responsiveBreakpoint = false,
  emptyState: customEmptyState,
  children,
  filter,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'content-list-table',
}

functions.label: CreatedByCell
description:
Cell renderer for `Column.CreatedBy`.

Self-loading: uses `useProfile(uid)` which triggers a batched load if the
profile is not yet cached. Multiple cells mounting in the same frame get
their requests batched into a single `bulkResolve`.

All avatar types are clickable: clicking toggles an include filter,
holding Cmd/Ctrl toggles exclude. Managed items use the `__managed__`
sentinel, items without a creator use `__no_creator__`, and regular
items filter by their UID.

functions.label: DeleteConfirmationComponent
description:
Presentational confirmation modal for delete operations.

Stateless — all data and callbacks are provided via props.
Use

for the connected version that
reads from content list context.
signature: ({ items, entityName, entityNamePlural, isDeleting, error, onCancel, onConfirm, }:

children.label:
{
  items,
  entityName,
  entityNamePlural,
  isDeleting,
  error,
  onCancel,
  onConfirm,
}

functions.label: DeleteConfirmationModal
description:
Connected confirmation modal for delete operations.

Reads `item.onDelete` and entity labels from the provider config, calls
`refetch` on success, and manages `isDeleting`/`error` locally.
Delegates rendering to

functions.label: FilterPopover
description:
`FilterPopover` component.

Base component for filter popovers with consistent styling.

Provides:
- `EuiPopover` with arrow and proper padding.
- `EuiFilterButton` with active filter badge.
- Bold title header with border.
signature: ({ title, buttonLabel, totalCount, activeCount, isOpen, onToggle, onClose, panelWidth, panelMinWidth, anchorPosition, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, children, }:

children.label:
{
  title,
  buttonLabel,
  totalCount,
  activeCount = 0,
  isOpen,
  onToggle,
  onClose,
  panelWidth,
  panelMinWidth,
  anchorPosition = 'downCenter',
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj,
  children,
}

returnComment: A React element containing the filter popover.

functions.label: FilterPopoverHeader
description:
Header section for filter popovers with search and selection controls.

Includes:
- Optional search box (from `EuiSelectable`).
- "X selected" count.
- "Clear filter" button.

functions.label: getRowId
description: Get a stable row ID for EuiBasicTable's `itemId` prop.

children.label: id
description: - The item's ID.

functions.label: NameCell
description:
Default rich renderer for the name column that includes:
- Clickable title (with href or onClick).
- Inline star button (if `showStarred` is true and `supports.starred`).
- Description (if available and `showDescription` is true).
- Tag badges (if available and `showTags` is true).

When `showTags` is true, clicking a tag badge toggles a filter on the
content list (include on click, exclude on modifier+click). Provide
`onTagClick` to override this behavior.

Memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders when parent table re-renders.
signature: > & { readonly type: ({ item, showDescription, showTags, showStarred, onClick, shouldUseHref, onTagClick, }:

functions.label: NameCellTags
description:
Renders tag badges below the title/description in the name cell.

Provides a built-in click handler that toggles tag filters on the
content list state:
- **Click**: toggles the tag as an include filter.
- **Modifier+click** (Cmd on macOS, Ctrl on Windows/Linux): toggles
  the tag as an exclude filter.

Consumers can override this behavior via the `onTagClick` prop.

functions.label: PaginationComponent
description:
Pure presentational pagination component wrapping `EuiTablePagination`.

All data is provided via props -- no provider hooks.
This component is suitable for unit testing without a provider.
signature: ({ pageIndex, pageSize, totalItems, pageSizeOptions, onPageChange, onPageSizeChange, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:

children.label:
{
  pageIndex,
  pageSize,
  totalItems,
  pageSizeOptions,
  onPageChange,
  onPageSizeChange,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'contentListFooter-pagination',
}

functions.label: SelectableFilterPopover
description:
`SelectableFilterPopover` component.

A reusable multi-select filter popover with include/exclude support.

Provides:
- `EuiSelectable` with search.
- Include/exclude via modifier key (Cmd/Ctrl + click).
- Filter counts with active state badges.
- Standard header with selection count and clear button.
- Standard footer with modifier key tip.
signature: <T extends object = Record<string, unknown>>({ fieldName, title, query, onChange, options, renderOption, singleSelection, isLoading, emptyMessage, noMatchesMessage, panelWidth, panelMinWidth, footerContent, headerContent, onToggle: onToggleProp, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:

children.label:
{
  fieldName,
  title,
  query,
  onChange,
  options,
  renderOption,
  singleSelection = false,
  isLoading,
  emptyMessage,
  noMatchesMessage,
  panelWidth,
  panelMinWidth,
  footerContent,
  headerContent,
  onToggle: onToggleProp,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'selectableFilterPopover',
}

functions.label: StandardFilterOption
description:
Standard option layout with content and optional count badge.

Include/exclude is handled by `SelectableFilterPopover`'s modifier key
tracking — no click handler is needed on individual options.

functions.label: StarButton
description:
Thin wrapper around `FavoriteButton` that renders `null` when
`supports.starred` is false. Shared by `StarredCell` and `NameCell`.

functions.label: StarredCell
description:
Cell renderer for `Column.Starred`. Centers the star button in the
narrow fixed-width column. The star button is always visible (not hover-only).

functions.label: UpdatedAtCell
description:
Cell renderer for the `UpdatedAt` column.

Displays the last updated timestamp with the following formatting:
- Within the last 7 days: locale-aware relative time via `FormattedRelative`
  from `@kbn/i18n-react` (e.g., "2 hours ago"). Auto-updates as time passes.
- Older than 7 days: abbreviated absolute date (e.g., "Jan 5, 2025").
- Missing value: dash with tooltip "Last updated unknown".

A tooltip always shows the full date and time (e.g., "January 5, 2025 3:42 PM").

Memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders when parent table re-renders.

functions.label: useContentListConfig
description:
Hook to access the content list configuration context.

This is a low-level hook that provides access to configuration and support flags.
For most use cases, prefer the feature-specific hooks like `useContentListItems`,
`useContentListSort`, etc.
returnComment: The content list context including configuration and support flags.

functions.label: useContentListFilters
description:
Hook to read the current filter state and clear all filters.

Derives `ActiveFilters` from `queryText` via `useActiveFilters`.

`clearFilters` strips structured filter/flag clauses from `queryText`
while preserving free-text search. For example, clearing
`"tag:production is:starred my search"` yields `"my search"`.

functions.label: useContentListItems
description: Hook to access the current list of items and loading state.
signature: <Record<string, unknown>>[]; totalItems: number; isLoading: boolean; isFetching: boolean; error: Error | undefined; hasNoItems: boolean; hasNoResults: boolean; hasActiveQuery: boolean; refetch: () => Promise<void>; }
returnComment:
Object containing items, totalItems, isLoading, isFetching, error,
hasNoItems, hasNoResults, hasActiveQuery, and refetch.

functions.label: useContentListPagination
description:
Hook to access and control pagination functionality.

Use this hook when you need to read or update the current page.
When pagination is disabled via `features.pagination: false`, `setPageIndex`
and `setPageSize` become no-ops and `isSupported` returns `false`.
returnComment: Object containing pagination state and control functions.

functions.label: useContentListPhase
description:
Hook to access the current render phase of the Content List.

Use this to decide what a section renders without chaining multiple
`isLoading` / `isFetching` / `hasNoItems` / `hasNoResults` checks.

functions.label: useContentListSearch
description:
Hook to access and control the search query.

`queryText` is the source of truth — read directly from state.
The structured model (

) is derived on-demand
by consumers that need it (via `useQueryModel`).

functions.label: useContentListSelection
description:
Hook to access and control item selection.

Provides the current selection state and functions to modify it.
When selection is disabled (via `features.selection: false` or `isReadOnly`),
`setSelection` and `clearSelection` become no-ops and `isSupported` returns `false`.
returnComment: Object containing selection state, mutation functions, and support flag.

functions.label: useContentListSort
description:
Hook to access and control sorting functionality.

Use this hook when you need to read or update the sort configuration.
When sorting is disabled via `features.sorting: false`, `setSort` becomes a no-op
and `isSupported` returns `false`.
returnComment: Object containing field, direction, setSort function, and isSupported flag.

functions.label: useContentListState
description:
Hook to access the content list state and dispatch function.

This is a low-level hook. For most use cases, prefer the feature-specific hooks
like `useContentListSort`, `useContentListItems`, etc.
returnComment: The state context value including state, dispatch, and refetch.

functions.label: useCreatedByFilterToggle
description: Convenience wrapper around
for the `createdBy` field.

functions.label: useDeleteConfirmation
description: Encapsulates the open/close state for a

.

Consumers call `requestDelete(items)` to open the modal and render
`deleteModal` in their JSX. The modal handles confirmation, deletion
(via the provider's `onDelete`), loading, and error display internally.

functions.label: useFilterFacets
description:
React Query hook that calls a filter feature's `getFacets` callback.

Returns display-ready

arrays for filter popovers.
The `T` parameter carries through to the facet `data` field so renderers
receive typed payloads without casting.

Disabled when the feature is `true` (no config) or `false` — only fires
when a

with `getFacets` is provided.

Call with `enabled: isPopoverOpen` so it fires lazily on popover open.
signature: <T = unknown>(filterId: string, opts?: { enabled?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined) =>

children.label: filterId
description: - The filter dimension key (e.g. `'createdBy'`, `'tag'`).

children.label: opts
description: - Options including `enabled` to control when the query fires.

functions.label: useFilterToggle
description:
Generic hook for toggling a value in any field filter via EUI Query mutations.

Parses the current `queryText` → mutates the EUI Query → dispatches the
new text. Same pattern as `useFieldQueryFilter` in the toolbar, but works
from outside EuiSearchBar (e.g., avatar clicks, tag badge clicks).

For known filters, prefer the convenience wrappers
and

children.label: fieldName
description: - The field name (e.g., `'tag'`, `'createdBy'`).

functions.label: useProfile
description:
Resolve a single profile by UID. Self-loading — triggers a batched load
if the profile is not yet cached.

Multiple cells calling `useProfile` in the same render frame get their
requests batched into a single `bulkResolve` (50ms window via
`createBatcher`).

functions.label: useProfileCache
description: Get the

instance (stable, never changes identity).

Returns `undefined` when user profiles are not configured.

functions.label: useProfileCacheVersion
description:
Subscribe to cache version changes.

Re-renders only when profiles are actually loaded (version bumps).
Use alongside `useProfileCache()` when you need reactive access to
the cache contents (e.g. field definitions that recompute on cache change).

functions.label: useSelection
description:
Hook to integrate content list selection with `EuiBasicTable`.

Bridges the provider's selection state with `EuiBasicTable`'s `selection` prop
using **controlled mode** (`selected`). This ensures programmatic selection
changes (e.g., clearing after delete) are reflected in the table checkboxes.

functions.label: useTagFilterToggle
description: Convenience wrapper around
for the `tag` field.

interfaces.label: ActionNamespace
description:
Namespace interface for `Action` sub-components.

The base `Action` accepts

; pre-built actions
are properties (e.g., `Action.Edit`, `Action.Delete`, `Action.Inspect`).

interfaces.label: ActionProps
description:
Props for the `Action` component (custom actions).

Custom actions are identified by `props.id` and provide their own
behavior. Pre-built actions (like `Action.Edit`) have dedicated
preset components with their own props interfaces.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for the action.

children.label: name
description: Display name for the action (shown in menu and tooltip).

children.label: description
description: Accessible description for the action.

children.label: icon
description: Icon type (EUI icon name).

children.label: type
description: Render type: `'icon'` (compact) or `'button'` (full).

children.label: color
description: Icon/button color (matches EUI button color palette).

children.label: onClick
description: Click handler.

children.label: href
description: Link href (string or function returning href per item).

children.label: enabled
description: Whether the action is enabled for a given item.

children.label: available
description: Whether the action is available (visible) for a given item.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Test subject for testing.

interfaces.label: ActionsColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column.Actions` preset component.

These are the declarative attributes consumers pass in JSX. The actions builder
reads them directly from the parsed attributes.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Custom column title. Defaults to `'Actions'`.

children.label: sticky
description: Whether to stick the actions column to the right side during horizontal scroll.

children.label: children
description:
Action children.

When provided, only the specified actions are rendered in the given order.
When omitted, actions are determined automatically from the provider config
(e.g., edit is shown if `getEditUrl` or `onEdit` is configured, delete is
shown if `onDelete` is configured).

interfaces.label: ColumnNamespace
description:
Namespace interface for `Column` sub-components.

The base `Column` accepts

; pre-built columns
are properties (e.g., `Column.Name`, `Column.Actions`).

children.label: Starred
description: Pre-built star-toggle column for favoritable items.

children.label: props
description: - {@link StarredColumnProps}

children.label: CreatedBy
description: Pre-built "Created by" avatar column.

children.label: props
description: - {@link CreatedByColumnProps}

interfaces.label: ColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column` component (custom columns).

Custom columns are identified by `props.id` and provide their own
`render` function. Pre-built columns (like `Column.Name`) have
dedicated preset components with their own props interfaces.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for the column.

children.label: name
description: Display name for the column header.

children.label: sortable
description: Whether the column is sortable.

children.label: field
description:
Optional field name to use for sorting and/or value lookup.

Defaults to the column `id` when omitted.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional test subject for the column header/cells.

children.label: render
description: Render function for the column cells.

interfaces.label: ContentListFeatures
description: Feature configuration for enabling/customizing content list capabilities.

children.label: sorting
description: Sorting configuration.

children.label: pagination
description: Pagination configuration. Set to `false` to disable pagination entirely.

children.label: search
description: Search configuration.

children.label: selection
description:
Selection configuration.
When `true` (default), row selection checkboxes are shown and bulk
actions are enabled. Set to `false` to disable selection entirely.
Selection is automatically disabled when `isReadOnly` is `true`.

children.label: tags
description:
Tags feature configuration.

- `true` or `undefined`: Auto-enabled when `services.tags` is provided.
- `false`: Explicitly disables tags even if `services.tags` is present.
- `FilterFacetConfig`: Enables tags with popover facets from `getFacets`.

children.label: starred
description:
Starred feature configuration.

- `true` or `undefined`: Auto-enabled when `services.favorites` is provided.
- `false`: Explicitly disables starring even if `services.favorites` is present.

children.label: userProfiles
description:
User profiles feature configuration (createdBy filter, etc.).

- `true` or `undefined`: Auto-enabled when `services.userProfiles` is provided.
- `false`: Explicitly disables user profile features even if the service is present.
- `FilterFacetConfig`: Enables user profiles with popover facets from `getFacets`.

children.label: fields
description:
Additional field definitions for consumer-specific filter dimensions
(e.g. `updatedBy`, `type`, `status`).

Merged with built-in field definitions (tag, createdBy) in `useFieldDefinitions`.
Each entry registers a field name in the search bar schema and provides
ID ↔ display resolution for query parsing.

children.label: flags
description:
Additional flag definitions for consumer-specific boolean toggles
(e.g. `is:managed`, `is:deprecated`).

Merged with built-in flag definitions (starred) in `useFieldDefinitions`.

interfaces.label: ContentListFooterProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional `data-test-subj` attribute for testing.

interfaces.label: ContentListItemConfig
description: Per-item configuration for link behavior and actions.

children.label: getHref
description:
Function to generate the href for an item link.
When provided, item titles become clickable links.

children.label: getEditUrl
description:
Function to generate the edit URL for an item.
When provided, the edit action renders as an `<a>` link with this `href`,
preserving native link behavior (right-click, middle-click, screen reader
announcement).

Composable with `onEdit`: when both are provided, the action renders as a
link (`href`) and also calls `onEdit` on click (e.g., for analytics tracking).

children.label: onEdit
description:
Callback invoked when the edit action is clicked.
Use this for side effects such as opening a flyout, tracking analytics,
or programmatic navigation.

When provided alone, the action renders as a button with an `onClick` handler.
When provided alongside `getEditUrl`, both are applied: the action renders
as a link and the callback fires on click.

children.label: onDelete
description:
Callback invoked to delete one or more items.
When provided, enables the delete action on rows and the bulk-delete flow.
The callback should handle the actual deletion and return a resolved promise on success.

children.label: onInspect
description:
Callback invoked to inspect an item (view/edit its metadata).
When provided, enables the "View details" row action.

This is a simple, UI-agnostic callback — the implementation decides what
happens when the action fires (e.g., opening a flyout, navigating to a
detail page). The Kibana content editor integration is handled by
`ContentListClientProvider` in `@kbn/content-list-provider-client`.

interfaces.label: ContentListLabels
description:
User-facing labels for the content type.

These should be i18n-translated strings for display in the UI.

children.label: entity
description: Singular form of the entity name (e.g., "dashboard"). Should be i18n-translated.

children.label: entityPlural
description: Plural form of the entity name (e.g., "dashboards"). Should be i18n-translated.

children.label: searchPlaceholder
description: Placeholder text for the search input. Should be i18n-translated.

interfaces.label: ContentListProps
description: Props for

children.label: children
description:
Sections laid out inside a flex-column container with consistent gap
between them. Typical children are `<ContentListToolbar />`,
`<ContentListTable />`, and `<ContentListFooter />`.

children.label: emptyState
description:
Rendered in place of `children` when the phase is `'empty'`. When omitted,
`ContentList` renders a provider-aware default prompt. Pass `null` to
intentionally suppress the empty-state region.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional `data-test-subj`.

interfaces.label: ContentListServices
description:
Services provided to the content list provider to enable additional capabilities.

Each service follows a pattern where providing the service enables the corresponding
feature by default. Features can be explicitly disabled via the `features` prop
even when the service is present.

children.label: tags
description:
Tags service for tag-based filtering and display.

Uses the standard `ContentManagementTagsServices` interface from `@kbn/content-management-tags`.
Provides `getTagList` for listing available tags and optionally `parseSearchQuery`
for extracting tag filters from the search bar query text.

children.label: favorites
description:
Favorites service for starring items.

Uses the `FavoritesClientPublic` interface from `@kbn/content-management-favorites-public`.
When provided, enables the starred feature (star button in table rows, starred
filter in toolbar) unless explicitly disabled via `features.starred: false`.

children.label: userProfiles
description:
User profiles service for user-based filtering.

When provided, enables the `createdBy` filter (and future `updatedBy`, `owner`,
etc.) unless explicitly disabled via `features.userProfiles: false`.

interfaces.label: ContentListTableProps
description: Props for ContentListTable component.

children.label: title
description: Accessible title for the table (used as table caption for screen readers).

children.label: tableLayout
description: Table layout mode.

children.label: compressed
description: Compressed table style.

children.label: scrollableInline
description:
Whether to enable horizontal scrolling when columns exceed the container width.
Required for sticky columns (e.g. `Column.Actions` with `sticky: true`).

children.label: responsiveBreakpoint
description:
Named breakpoint below which the table collapses into responsive cards.
Set to `false` to always render as a table, or `true` to always render cards.

Content List defaults to `false` because the card layout does not support
selection checkboxes, tag badges, star buttons, or action columns.

children.label: emptyState
description:
Custom empty state component.
If not provided, uses default empty state.

children.label: children
description:
Column components as children.
If no children provided, defaults to Name column.

children.label: filter
description:
Optional filter function to filter items from the provider.
Useful when multiple tables share a single provider but display different subsets.

**Important:** This function should be memoized (e.g., with `useCallback`) to prevent
unnecessary re-filtering on every render.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Test subject for testing.

interfaces.label: ContentListToolbarProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: children
description: Optional children for declarative configuration via

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional `data-test-subj` attribute for testing.

interfaces.label: CreatedByCellProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: createdBy
description: The user ID (`uid`) of the item's creator.

children.label: managed
description: Whether the item is system-managed (e.g. part of a package).

interfaces.label: CreatedByColumnProps
description: Props for the `Column.CreatedBy` preset component.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Override column header text. Defaults to "Created by".

interfaces.label: DataSourceConfig
description: Data source configuration properties.

children.label: findItems
description: Fetches items from the data source.

children.label: debounceMs
description:
Debounce delay in milliseconds applied to query-parameter changes before
a new `findItems` request is issued.

Defaults to

(300 ms), matching the Table List
View's built-in fetch debounce. Set to `0` to disable debouncing.

children.label: onInvalidate
description:
Called automatically before every explicit `refetch()` (e.g. after a
delete or create) so the next `findItems` call hits the server instead
of returning stale cached data.

Client-side providers that cache the server response between calls
should set this to clear that cache. Server-based providers that
always call through can omit it.

children.label: onRefresh
description:
Lightweight refresh: re-decorates cached items with external data

interfaces.label: FilterFacet
description:
A single display-ready facet for a filter popover option.

The `T` parameter carries provider-specific data through the facet pipeline,
e.g. `FilterFacet<Tag>` for tag facets or `FilterFacet<UserProfileEntry>`
for user profile facets. Renderers receive the typed `data` without casting.

children.label: key
description: Unique key identifying this facet (e.g. user UID, tag ID).

children.label: label
description: Human-readable display label.

children.label: count
description: Optional item count for this facet value.

children.label: data
description: Optional provider-specific data (e.g. `UserProfileEntry` for profiles, `Tag` for tags).

interfaces.label: FindItemsParams
description: Parameters for the `findItems` function.

children.label: searchQuery
description:
Search query text with filter syntax already extracted.

This is a convenience alias for `filters.search ?? ''`. When building
queries, prefer this over accessing `filters.search` directly.

children.label: filters
description:
Active filters (includes the raw `search` text and any structured filters).

The `createdBy` dimension may contain sentinel keys (
) in addition to real user UIDs. Use

to map items to matching keys when implementing
client-side filtering.

children.label: sort
description:
Sort configuration.

When sorting is disabled via `features.sorting: false`, this will be `undefined`.
Implementations should return items in their natural order (e.g., server default).

children.label: page
description: Pagination configuration.

children.label: signal
description: AbortSignal for request cancellation.

interfaces.label: FindItemsResult
description: Result from the `findItems` function.

children.label: items
description: Items for the current page.

children.label: total
description: Total matching items for pagination.

children.label: onClick

Optional click handler for tag badges.

When omitted, the built-in handler toggles include/exclude
filters via

children.label: showTags
description:
Whether to show tags below the title/description.
Requires `item.tags` to contain tag IDs and a tags service
to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

Auto-enabled when the provider has `supports.tags === true`
(i.e., a tags service is configured). Set to `false` to
explicitly disable tags even when the service is available.

children.label: showStarred
description:
Whether to show a star button inline after the title.
Requires `services.favorites` to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

children.label: onClick
description:
Optional click handler for the title.
When provided, the provider-level `item.getHref` is ignored unless
`shouldUseHref` is explicitly `true`.

children.label: shouldUseHref
description:
Whether to use the provider-level `item.getHref` for the title link.
Defaults to `true` unless `onClick` is provided.

children.label: onTagClick
description:
Optional click handler for tag badges.
Called with the tag and a boolean indicating whether a modifier key
(Cmd on Mac, Ctrl on Windows/Linux) was held during the click.
Only effective when `showTags` is `true`.

children.label: render
description: Custom render function (overrides default rendering).

Use `options` for full control over each dropdown option.

Ignored if `fields` is provided.

misc.label: ActionsColumn
description:
Actions column specification component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the Actions column configuration as React children.
Action children control which row actions are displayed and in what order.

misc.label: ContentListConfig
description: Complete configuration for a content list.

misc.label: ContentListCoreConfig
description: Core configuration - entity metadata and base settings.

misc.label: ContentListIdentity
description:
Identity configuration for content lists.

At least one of `id` or `queryKeyScope` must be provided:

- **`id` only**: `queryKeyScope` is derived as `${id}-listing`. Use when you want a simple
  identifier that also serves as the cache key base.

- **`queryKeyScope` only**: Use when you only need cache isolation without a semantic identifier.

- **Both**: `queryKeyScope` is used for caching/persistence, `id` is available for other
  purposes (e.g., `data-test-subj`, analytics).
signature: { id: string; queryKeyScope?: string | undefined; } | { id?: string | undefined; queryKeyScope: string; }

misc.label: ContentListItem
description:
Standardized item structure for rendering components (tables, grids, etc.).

This is the common interface that all rendering components work with,
regardless of the underlying datasource type. The `findItems` function
in `DataSourceConfig` must return items in this format.
signature: T & { id: string; title: string; description?: string | undefined; type?: string | undefined; updatedAt?: Date | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; createdAt?: string | undefined; createdBy?: string | undefined; updatedBy?: string | undefined; managed?: boolean | undefined; }

misc.label: ContentListPhase
description:
Mutually-exclusive render phase for a Content List.

Every Content List is in exactly one phase at a time. Sections (toolbar,
table, footer, custom children) branch on the phase to decide what to
render: skeletons during `'initialLoad'`, `null` during `'empty'`, normal
UI during `'populated'`, and nuanced in-flight / no-match variants during
`'filtering'` / `'filtered'`.

Phase transitions:
- `'initialLoad'` → `'empty' | 'filtered' | 'populated'` (first fetch completes).
- `'populated'` ↔ `'filtering'` (user applies a filter/search).
- `'filtering'` → `'filtered' | 'populated'` (filtered fetch completes).
- `'filtered'` → `'filtering' | 'populated' | 'empty'` (filter changes or
  is cleared).

A refetch that does not involve a filter change stays in the current
phase; it does NOT re-enter `'initialLoad'`.

misc.label: ContentListProviderProps
description: Props for the `ContentListProvider` component.

misc.label: CreatedByColumn
description:
Created By column specification component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies a column showing the item's creator as a clickable avatar.

Clicking the avatar toggles an include filter for that user. Hold
Cmd (Mac) or Ctrl (Windows/Linux) while clicking to exclude instead.

misc.label: CreatedByFilter
description:
`CreatedByFilter` declarative component for toolbar filter composition.

Resolves to a `custom_component` filter using
when the user profiles service is available (`hasCreatedBy` is true).

misc.label: DeleteAction
description:
Delete action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the delete action (with confirmation) within a `Column.Actions` context.

misc.label: EditAction
description:
Edit action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the edit action within a `Column.Actions` context.

misc.label: InspectAction
description:
Inspect action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the inspect (view details) action within a `Column.Actions` context.
Opens the content editor flyout for the selected item.

misc.label: NameColumn
description:
Name column specification component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It's used to specify the Name column configuration as React children.

misc.label: StarredColumn
description:
Starred column specification component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies a narrow star-icon column.

misc.label: UpdatedAtColumn
description:
UpdatedAt column specification component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It's used to specify the UpdatedAt column configuration as React children.

.

`undefined` when user profiles are not configured.
